rationale: Agriculture & Food at L3 maps directly to ag-school department structure: agronomy splits by crop class (cereals, legumes, oilseeds, root crops); animal science splits by livestock species; food science splits by food category + safety + processing engineering. Nutrition gets 3 leaves (macronutrient mechanism, nutrigenomics, gut microbiome-diet). Veterinary medicine gets 3 (companion, livestock, equine/exotic).

subfields.name: Cereal & Grain Agronomy
subfields.tagline: Wheat, rice, maize, sorghum — production, agronomy, breeding.

subfields.name: Legume & Oilseed Agronomy
subfields.tagline: Soybean, pulses, oilseeds — production, nitrogen fixation, breeding.

subfields.name: Precision Agriculture
subfields.tagline: Precision agriculture, GIS in farming, variable-rate management.

subfields.name: Crop Physiology & Stress Tolerance
subfields.tagline: Drought tolerance, heat stress, abiotic stress, crop physiology applied.

subfields.name: Plant Disease Resistance & Breeding
subfields.tagline: Plant disease resistance, plant immunity (applied), resistance breeding.

subfields.name: Integrated Pest Management & Biocontrol
subfields.tagline: IPM, biological control, agroecology pest management.

subfields.name: Agricultural Entomology & Mycology
subfields.tagline: Insect ecology applied, agricultural mycology, fungal disease management.

subfields.name: Soil Fertility & Nutrient Management
subfields.tagline: Soil fertility, fertilizer use efficiency, nutrient cycling on farms.

subfields.name: Soil Microbiology (Applied)
subfields.tagline: Rhizosphere microbes, soil microbiome management, soil microbial ecology applied.

subfields.name: Soil Carbon & Climate-Smart Soil
subfields.tagline: Soil carbon sequestration, climate-smart soil management, soil health metrics.

subfields.name: Pedology & Soil Mapping
subfields.tagline: Pedology, soil classification, digital soil mapping.

subfields.name: Horticulture — Fruit & Vegetable
subfields.tagline: Pomology, vegetable crops, post-harvest, controlled-environment production.

subfields.name: Viticulture & Enology
subfields.tagline: Viticulture, enology, wine chemistry-applied.

subfields.name: Urban & Controlled-Environment Agriculture
subfields.tagline: Vertical farming, urban agriculture, hydroponics, indoor farming.

subfields.name: Ruminant Nutrition & Production
subfields.tagline: Cattle, sheep, goat nutrition; rumen biology applied; ruminant production.

subfields.name: Monogastric & Poultry Nutrition
subfields.tagline: Swine and poultry nutrition, monogastric production, feed formulation.

subfields.name: Dairy Science & Production
subfields.tagline: Dairy production, milk science, dairy cow health and production.

subfields.name: Livestock Breeding & Genetics
subfields.tagline: Animal breeding programs, genomic selection in livestock, quantitative animal genetics.

subfields.name: Animal Welfare & Husbandry
subfields.tagline: Livestock welfare, behavior assessment, welfare-friendly husbandry.

subfields.name: Companion Animal Medicine
subfields.tagline: Small animal (dog/cat) clinical medicine, internal medicine, oncology, surgery.

subfields.name: Livestock Veterinary Medicine
subfields.tagline: Bovine, ovine, porcine, poultry health management, herd health.

subfields.name: Equine, Wildlife & Exotic Veterinary
subfields.tagline: Equine medicine, wildlife medicine, zoological medicine, exotic species.

subfields.name: Aquaculture Production & Fish Nutrition
subfields.tagline: Aquaculture systems, fish nutrition, RAS, shellfish culture.

subfields.name: Fisheries Stock Management
subfields.tagline: Fisheries stock assessment, sustainable harvest, bycatch research.

subfields.name: Food Processing Engineering
subfields.tagline: Food processing engineering, thermal/non-thermal processing, food rheology.

subfields.name: Food Chemistry & Packaging
subfields.tagline: Food chemistry, flavor and color science, food packaging.

subfields.name: Food Microbiology & Fermentation
subfields.tagline: Food fermentation, food microbiology, probiotic foods.

subfields.name: Novel & Alternative Foods
subfields.tagline: Alternative proteins, cellular meat, plant-based food, insect food.

subfields.name: Foodborne Pathogens & Safety
subfields.tagline: Foodborne pathogen surveillance, food safety risk assessment.

subfields.name: Food Authenticity & Fraud Detection
subfields.tagline: Food authenticity, traceability, food fraud detection.

subfields.name: Food Contaminants & Allergens
subfields.tagline: Mycotoxins, heavy metals in food, food allergen research.

subfields.name: Macronutrient & Bioactive Mechanism
subfields.tagline: Macronutrient metabolism, bioactive compounds, dietary intervention mechanisms.

subfields.name: Nutrigenomics & Precision Nutrition
subfields.tagline: Nutrigenomics, personalized nutrition, precision nutrition research.

subfields.name: Diet & Gut Microbiome
subfields.tagline: Diet-microbiome interactions, prebiotics, dietary fiber effects.

uncovered_concerns: Sustainable & Regenerative Agriculture L2 papers fold under soil carbon + IPM + crop physiology at L3.
Agricultural Economics & Policy L2 has its own leaf set at L1 Economics & Finance overlap — folds there.
Agricultural Engineering & Precision Ag L2 papers fold under precision ag + smart manufacturing leaves.
